operator_cleanup_project_get.postgresqlSql: SELECT pi.process_instance_id::text AS project_id, pi.status, pi.current_stage, pi.current_owner, pi.snapshot_json::text AS snapshot_json, projection.project_slug, projection.project_name FROM core.process_instances AS pi LEFT JOIN ui.project_charter_projection AS projection ON projection.project_id = pi.process_instance_id WHERE pi.process_instance_id = %s::uuid LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE OF pi
operator_cleanup_project_get.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) pi.process_instance_id AS project_id, pi.status, pi.current_stage, pi.current_owner, pi.snapshot_json, projection.project_slug, projection.project_name FROM core.process_instances AS pi LEFT JOIN ui.project_charter_projection AS projection ON projection.project_id = pi.process_instance_id WHERE pi.process_instance_id = ?

operator_cleanup_workflow_get.postgresqlSql: SELECT workflow_id::text AS workflow_id, slug, name, status, version FROM core.workflows WHERE workflow_id = %s::uuid FOR UPDATE
operator_cleanup_workflow_get.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) workflow_id AS workflow_id, slug, name, status, version FROM core.workflows WHERE workflow_id = ?

operator_cleanup_workflow_belongs_to_pro.postgresqlSql: SELECT 1 FROM ui.project_charter_projection AS projection LEFT JOIN core.workflow_links AS link ON link.parent_workflow_id = projection.workflow_id WHERE projection.project_id = %s::uuid AND (projection.workflow_id = %s::uuid OR link.child_workflow_id = %s::uuid) LIMIT 1
operator_cleanup_workflow_belongs_to_pro.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM ui.project_charter_projection AS projection LEFT JOIN core.workflow_links AS link ON link.parent_workflow_id = projection.workflow_id WHERE projection.project_id = ? AND (projection.workflow_id = ? OR link.child_workflow_id = ?)

operator_cleanup_runs_list.postgresqlSql: SELECT workflow_run_id::text AS workflow_run_id, workflow_id::text AS workflow_id, status, trigger_type, initiated_by, started_at, completed_at FROM decisioning.workflow_runs WHERE workflow_id = %s::uuid AND workflow_run_id = ANY(%s::uuid[]) FOR UPDATE
operator_cleanup_runs_list.sqlServerSql: SELECT workflow_run_id, workflow_id, status, trigger_type, initiated_by, started_at, completed_at FROM decisioning.workflow_runs WHERE workflow_id = ? AND workflow_run_id IN (?)

operator_cleanup_matching_claims_list.postgresqlSql: SELECT DISTINCT claim.claim_id::text AS claim_id, claim.claim_name, claim.actor_id, claim.claim_status AS status, claim.metadata_json::text AS metadata_json FROM governance.claims AS claim LEFT JOIN governance.agent_context_sessions AS context_session ON context_session.context_session_id = claim.context_session_id LEFT JOIN decisioning.agent_sessions AS agent_session ON agent_session.session_key = context_session.runtime_session_id OR agent_session.agent_session_id::text = context_session.runtime_session_id WHERE claim.claim_status = 'active' AND (claim.metadata_json @> jsonb_build_object('project_id', %s::text) OR claim.metadata_json @> jsonb_build_object('workflow_id', %s::text) OR claim.metadata_json ->> 'workflow_run_id' = ANY(%s::text[]) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(claim.metadata_json -> 'workflow_run_ids') = 'array' THEN claim.metadata_json -> 'workflow_run_ids' ELSE '[]'::jsonb END) AS metadata_run(workflow_run_id) WHERE metadata_run.workflow_run_id = ANY(%s::text[])) OR agent_session.workflow_run_id = ANY(%s::uuid[]))
operator_cleanup_matching_claims_list.sqlServerSql: SELECT DISTINCT claim.claim_id AS claim_id, claim.claim_name, claim.actor_id, claim.claim_status AS status, claim.metadata_json FROM governance.claims AS claim WHERE claim.claim_status = 'active'

operator_cleanup_runs_close.postgresqlSql: UPDATE decisioning.workflow_runs SET status = %s::text, completed_at = COALESCE(completed_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WHERE workflow_run_id = ANY(%s::uuid[]) AND status IN ('queued', 'running', 'blocked') RETURNING workflow_run_id::text AS workflow_run_id, workflow_id::text AS workflow_id, status, completed_at
operator_cleanup_runs_close.sqlServerSql: UPDATE decisioning.workflow_runs SET status = ?, completed_at = COALESCE(completed_at, SYSUTCDATETIME()) OUTPUT INSERTED.workflow_run_id, INSERTED.workflow_id, INSERTED.status, INSERTED.completed_at WHERE workflow_run_id IN (?)

operator_cleanup_workflow_supersede.postgresqlSql: UPDATE core.workflows SET status = 'superseded', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE workflow_id = %s::uuid AND status = 'active' RETURNING workflow_id::text AS workflow_id, slug, name, status, version, updated_at
operator_cleanup_workflow_supersede.sqlServerSql: UPDATE core.workflows SET status = 'superseded', updated_at = SYSUTCDATETIME() OUTPUT INSERTED.workflow_id, INSERTED.slug, INSERTED.name, INSERTED.status, INSERTED.version, INSERTED.updated_at WHERE workflow_id = ?

operator_cleanup_project_supersede.postgresqlSql: UPDATE core.process_instances SET status = 'superseded', closed_at = COALESCE(closed_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), last_updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE process_instance_id = %s::uuid AND status IN ('open', 'active', 'ping-review', 'blocked') RETURNING process_instance_id::text AS project_id, status, current_stage, current_owner, closed_at, last_updated_at
operator_cleanup_project_supersede.sqlServerSql: UPDATE core.process_instances SET status = 'superseded', closed_at = COALESCE(closed_at, SYSUTCDATETIME()), last_updated_at = SYSUTCDATETIME() OUTPUT INSERTED.process_instance_id AS project_id, INSERTED.status, INSERTED.current_stage, INSERTED.current_owner, INSERTED.closed_at, INSERTED.last_updated_at WHERE process_instance_id = ?

operator_cleanup_claims_close.postgresqlSql: UPDATE governance.claims SET claim_status = 'closed', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE claim_id = ANY(%s::uuid[]) AND claim_status = 'active' RETURNING claim_id::text AS claim_id, claim_name, actor_id, claim_status AS status, updated_at
operator_cleanup_claims_close.sqlServerSql: UPDATE governance.claims SET claim_status = 'closed', updated_at = SYSUTCDATETIME() OUTPUT INSERTED.claim_id, INSERTED.claim_name, INSERTED.actor_id, INSERTED.claim_status AS status, INSERTED.updated_at WHERE claim_id IN (?)

operator_cleanup_completion_verify.postgresqlSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS active_workflow_run_count, %s::text AS project_slug FROM decisioning.workflow_runs AS run INNER JOIN core.workflows AS workflow ON workflow.workflow_id = run.workflow_id INNER JOIN ui.project_charter_projection AS projection ON projection.workflow_id = workflow.workflow_id OR projection.workflow_run_id = run.workflow_run_id WHERE projection.project_slug = %s AND run.status IN ('queued', 'running', 'blocked')
operator_cleanup_completion_verify.sqlServerSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_workflow_run_count, ? AS project_slug FROM decisioning.workflow_runs AS run

operator_cleanup_completion_verify_by_sl.postgresqlSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS active_workflow_run_count, %s::text AS project_slug FROM decisioning.workflow_runs AS run INNER JOIN core.workflows AS workflow ON workflow.workflow_id = run.workflow_id INNER JOIN ui.project_charter_projection AS projection ON projection.workflow_id = workflow.workflow_id OR projection.workflow_run_id = run.workflow_run_id WHERE projection.project_slug = %s AND run.status IN ('queued', 'running', 'blocked')
operator_cleanup_completion_verify_by_sl.sqlServerSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_workflow_run_count, ? AS project_slug FROM decisioning.workflow_runs AS run

operator_cleanup_completion_verify_by_pr.postgresqlSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS active_workflow_run_count, %s::text AS project_id FROM decisioning.workflow_runs AS run INNER JOIN core.workflows AS workflow ON workflow.workflow_id = run.workflow_id INNER JOIN ui.project_charter_projection AS projection ON projection.workflow_id = workflow.workflow_id OR projection.workflow_run_id = run.workflow_run_id WHERE projection.project_id = %s::uuid AND run.status IN ('queued', 'running', 'blocked')
operator_cleanup_completion_verify_by_pr.sqlServerSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_workflow_run_count, ? AS project_id FROM decisioning.workflow_runs AS run

operator_cleanup_execution_record_insert.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO governance.cleanup_execution_records (project_id, workflow_id, requested_workflow_run_ids_json, affected_workflow_run_ids_json, affected_claim_ids_json, before_state_json, after_state_json, reason, operator_identity, completion_status, active_workflow_run_count, verification_json, completed_at) VALUES (%s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s::jsonb, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) RETURNING cleanup_execution_record_id::text AS cleanup_execution_record_id, completion_status, active_workflow_run_count, created_at, completed_at
operator_cleanup_execution_record_insert.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO governance.cleanup_execution_records (project_id, workflow_id, requested_workflow_run_ids_json, affected_workflow_run_ids_json, affected_claim_ids_json, before_state_json, after_state_json, reason, operator_identity, completion_status, active_workflow_run_count, verification_json, completed_at) OUTPUT INSERTED.cleanup_execution_record_id, INSERTED.completion_status, INSERTED.active_workflow_run_count, INSERTED.created_at, INSERTED.completed_at VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, SYSUTCDATETIME())
